review.summary: Task review and requirement diff review both passed.
review.details: Base truth is origin/main, current branch is main, and the reviewed working tree diff hash is 755f4478f59f71fe60132be4f0276965776bea7fd5ea634861dce0761e4227ed. Plan completion audit found T001-T012 complete with spec/code review proof. Scope review found changes bounded to the REQ-002 surfaces: cc-roadmap contract, v3 state normalization, renderer, helper priority, public metadata tests, examples, docs, generated Codex mirror, and verification evidence. Critical pass found no unresolved shell injection, trust-boundary, enum completeness, silent data-loss, or generated-output drift issue. Old roadmap-tracking.json references remain only as explicit legacy fallback, migration notes, changelog history, or regression tests. Documentation staleness is covered by README, README.zh-CN, getting-started guides, example docs, examples binding validation, and Codex adapter drift check.
